title: Polymath stability evidence ledger
description: One entry per catalog plugin recording the live-run, adopter, and connector/infra distinct-value evidence that backs promotion. Consumed by tools/check-stability-evidence.py (STABILITY-1 conformance gate) and tools/build-catalog.py (status badge tooltip). The catalog's status field is the user-facing claim; this ledger is the receipt.

entries.description: Per-plugin evidence keyed by plugin name. Every plugin listed in registry/polymath-catalog.json must appear here exactly once (enforced by tools/check-stability-evidence.py).

target_status.description: The status this plugin is currently working toward. Equal to or above the catalog's current status.

evidence_state.description: Where the plugin stands on the evidence ladder. pre-evidence = only golden fixture. on-disk-skill = golden + bakeoff case + skill-triggering test (skill-shaped beta closure). on-disk-foundation = golden + executable unit tests + end-to-end workflow job (foundation beta closure). stable-ready = on-disk closure plus a live bakeoff and live trigger run that meet the stable bar, awaiting only an external adopter and changelog entry. stable = promoted, with all live fields populated.

live_bakeoff_run.description: URL of a published bakeoff run (GitHub Actions artifact or .pdata/bakeoff JSON committed under docs/) where this plugin's primary case scores ≥ 8 with delta ≥ 2 over baseline and the judge agrees. Null until a live run is published.

live_trigger_run.description: URL of a skill-triggering run where every one of three trigger phrasings invoked the expected skill (live, not just parseable). Null until a live run is published.

external_user_url.description: URL of an issue, fork, or PR from a user other than the maintainer that cites the plugin's files. Null until at least one external adopter is observed.

promotion_pr.description: URL of the PR that promoted this plugin to its current catalog status. Null while the plugin has never been promoted (still at experimental).

changelog_entry.description: Anchor in the plugin's CHANGELOG.md (or repo CHANGELOG.md) recording the most recent promotion. Null until a promotion has been recorded.

distinct_value_url.description: REQUIRED for integration and infra plugins seeking beta or stable. URL of primary-source evidence showing Polymath adds workflow / critique / safety / artifact value beyond the official MCP, CLI, LSP, or docs (a bakeoff case, a side-by-side artifact, or a documented workflow-shape gap). Must be non-null before an integration/infra plugin can promote past experimental under the post-Iteration-0 policy. Null for non-integration/non-infra plugins.

notes.description: Free-text caveat — what's missing, what the next step is. Optional.
